Consultancy Services

Strategic safety solutions for complex industrial challenges.

Risk Assessment & JSA

Comprehensive identification of workplace hazards and implementation of Job Safety Analysis (JSA) protocols.

Request Details

HSE Management Systems

Design and implementation of standard HSE management systems tailored to your industry.

Request Details

Safety Audits & Inspections

Thorough evaluation of your facilities and processes to ensure full compliance with safety regulations.

Request Details

Incident Investigation

Expert analysis of workplace accidents to identify root causes and prevent recurrence.

Request Details

Emergency Response Planning

Development of robust emergency procedures and evacuation plans to protect your workforce.

Request Details

Safety Equipment Supply

Reliable supply of fire extinguishers, PPE, and safety signage compliant with industry standards.

Request Details

Real-World Impact

Industrial Plant Optimization

Reduced workplace incidents by 45% through a comprehensive HAZOP study and revised safety protocols.

Case Study: Manufacturing

Oil & Gas Sector

Achieved 100% compliance with safety standards for a major offshore drilling operation.

Case Study: Energy Sector

SAFEPRO is a premier HSE training and consultancy agency dedicated to building safer working environments and advancing careers in health, safety, and environment.
